### use


```tsx
use: (node) =>
        // @ts-expect-error unknown schema
        node.schema.items?.type === 'string' && node.schema.uniqueItems && Array.isArray(node.schema.items?.enum)
```

## JSON Schema Options


### classNames


```tsx

```

placeholder?: string;

if supported, will add a placeholder for the input element

### hidden

hidden: boolean;
```

### title

title?: string;
```


title of this data point

### readOnly


```tsx
readOnly?: boolean;
```


disable edit of form, but allow selection and copy of value

### required


```tsx
required?: boolean;
```


flag data as required (visual only)

### canAddItem


```tsx
canAddItem?: boolean;
```


arrays only: if an item may be added without causing a validation error

### canRemoveItem


```tsx
canRemoveItem?: boolean;
```


arrays only: if an item may be removed without causing a validation error

### enum


```tsx
enum?: string[];
```


list of titles for the JSON Schema enum options - matched by index

### liveUpdate


```tsx
liveUpdate?: boolean;
```


if value should update on each keystroke instead of on blur. Defaults to false

### showHeader


```tsx
showHeader?: boolean;
```


if false, will hide title. will hide complete title-header if no menu-actions are available

### widgetMenuItems


```tsx
widgetMenuItems?: WidgetMenuItems;
```


internal option for menu action items
